name: FortressRuins
title: The Ruins Mod - Fortress Ruins
author: Sacredanarchy
description:
23 New enemy forts, 7 new assets, 3 new craftable items, a second recipe for A-bombs, 2 new crystallography research to complete and explosive machinegun ammo. This ruin pack is designed to challenge the player.
 Also try OldAbandonedSettlements ruin pack
